'''nazhulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podder|podder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podder|podder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nazhulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhilith|næzhilith]] || [[word:næzhilij|næzhilij]] || [[word:næzhilish|næzhilish]] || [[word:næzhili|næzhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhuzhuluth|nazhuzhuluth]] || [[word:nazhuzhuluj|nazhuzhuluj]] || [[word:nazhuzhulush|nazhuzhulush]] || [[word:nazhuzhulu|nazhuzhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhuluth|nazhuluth]] || [[word:nazhuluj|nazhuluj]] || [[word:nazhulush|nazhulush]] || [[word:nazhulu|nazhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhufluth|nazhufluth]] || [[word:nazhufluj|nazhufluj]] || [[word:nazhuflush|nazhuflush]] || [[word:nazhufluf|nazhufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhuluthu|nazhuluthu]] || [[word:nazhuluju|nazhuluju]] || [[word:nazhulushu|nazhulushu]] || [[word:nazhuluku|nazhuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhuluth|nazhuluth]] || [[word:nazhuluj|nazhuluj]] || [[word:nazhulush|nazhulush]] || [[word:nazhulu|nazhulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhuluthul|nazhuluthul]] || [[word:nazhulujul|nazhulujul]] || [[word:nazhulushul|nazhulushul]] || [[word:nazhulukul|nazhulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhuluthuthu|nazhuluthuthu]] || [[word:nazhulujuju|nazhulujuju]] || [[word:nazhulushushu|nazhulushushu]] || [[word:nazhuluku|nazhuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhuluthun|nazhuluthun]] || [[word:nazhulujun|nazhulujun]] || [[word:nazhulushun|nazhulushun]] || [[word:nazhulukun|nazhulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhuluthuoro|nazhuluthuoro]] || [[word:nazhulujuoro|nazhulujuoro]] || [[word:nazhulushuoro|nazhulushuoro]] || [[word:nazhulukuoro|nazhulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
